    "Belt mistracking caused by off-center material loading",
    "Potential hazard of belt edge damage and material spillage",
    "Risk of contact with moving parts due to belt displacement"

  "actions": [
    "Adjust the chute or loading mechanism to ensure material is deposited in the center of the belt",

    "Verify that guarding complies with OSHA 1910.212 during mistracking events"

  "rationale": "The belt mistracking is primarily diagnosed as a loading issue (off-center loading) rather than structural idler skew, as off-center loading forces the belt to seek a new lateral equilibrium. This causes immediate edge wear, spillage, and safety hazards under OSHA 1910.212, requiring immediate correction of the loading point and tracking controls.",

    "CEMA Belt Conveyors for Bulk Materials",
    "OSHA 1910.212"
  ]
